title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts

paragraphs.source: In this section, we will give a brief primer on technical concepts that may help the reader better interpret results. Some readers may not need this and can skip directly to our analysis of results. We will take a deeper dive into some of these topics after the results analysis.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In this section, we will give a brief primer on technical concepts that may help the reader better interpret results. Some readers may not need this and can skip directly to our analysis of results. We will take a deeper dive into some of these topics after the results analysis.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In this section, we will give a brief primer on technical concepts that may help the reader better interpret results. Some readers may not need this and can skip directly to our analysis of results. We will take a deeper dive into some of these topics after the results analysis.

pro.text: 在本节中，我们将提供一份简短的技术概念入门指南，帮助读者更好地解读结果。部分读者可能不需要这部分内容，可以直接跳到我们的结果分析。在结果分析之后，我们将对其中一些主题进行深度探讨。

applied_terms: Translate 'primer' as '入门指南' or '基础概念科普'. Keep the tone helpful and instructional.

understanding.role_in_article: Acts as a navigational signpost, preparing less-technical readers for foundational concepts.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Shifts the article's gear from high-level summaries and acknowledgments to deep technical foundations.
understanding.relation_to_next: Directly introduces the first technical concept: the Interactivity vs Throughput tradeoff.
key_points: Provides a brief technical primer necessary for interpreting the complex benchmark results to follow.
translation_notes: Translate 'primer' as '入门指南' or '基础概念科普'. Keep the tone helpful and instructional.
